params.name: Tom Sawyer Adventures
params.description:
On May 22, 1876 AD, Mark Twain published the famous children's novel Tom Sawyer Adventures.
Tom Sawyer Adventures is a beloved children's book written by Mark Twain that follows the exciting journey of young Tommy and Huck. Twain weaves in references to his own childhood in Missouri to create a vivid and authentic setting. While playing in the cemetery, Tommy and Huck witness a murder and flee to a deserted island in fear. After much internal conflict, they summon the courage to testify again …
